Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, perfect timing. Would you mind heading to the rooftop with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Now, now. No need to be so modest. We're all friends here, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Haha, no need to be so wary of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It isn't anything important... I just wanted to show you something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And I just so happen to have the key to the rooftop.[n]{f 1 1}
